settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and workspace preferences.

brand_knowledge.title: Brand Knowledge
brand_knowledge.subtitle: Help AI understand your brand so every generated copy feels on-brand.
brand_knowledge.extract_hint: We'll scan your homepage and auto-fill the fields below. You can edit anything before saving.
brand_knowledge.extract_error: Could not extract from that URL. Please fill in the fields manually.
brand_knowledge.tone_placeholder: e.g. Professional but friendly, witty, authoritative...
brand_knowledge.audience_placeholder: e.g. B2B founders aged 30–50 who want to save time
brand_knowledge.benefits_placeholder: e.g. Saves 5hrs/week, no code required, boosts conversions by 30%
brand_knowledge.about_placeholder: Tell the AI about your brand in your own words — your story, what makes you different, phrases you love, things to avoid, your ideal customer's mindset, product nuances... The more detail you add, the better every AI output will match your brand.
brand_knowledge.save_error: Failed to save. Please try again.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.personalInfoDesc: Update your name and email address.

password.title: Change password
password.desc: Choose a strong password of at least 8 characters.

team.title: Team members
team.desc: Invite team members to collaborate on your workspace.
team.comingSoonDesc: Invite teammates, assign roles and manage access — available in the Agency plan.
team.invite_error: Failed to send invite. Please try again.
team.no_members_sub: Invite colleagues to collaborate on your workspace.
team.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this team member?

workspace.title: Workspace name
workspace.desc: Change the display name of your active workspace.
workspace.label: Workspace name

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.desc: Connect your favourite tools to PagePersona.
integrations.comingSoonDesc: Zapier, Make, Slack, GA4, Meta Pixel and more — launching with the full product.

whitelabel.title: White Label
whitelabel.desc: Brand the client-facing dashboard with your own logo and colours.
whitelabel.logo_hint: Shown in the client dashboard topbar. Recommended: 200×50px PNG.
whitelabel.icon_hint: Used as the browser tab icon and sidebar brand mark. Recommended: 64×64px PNG or ICO.
whitelabel.color_hint: Used for buttons and highlights in the client dashboard.
whitelabel.save_error: Failed to save. Please try again.
whitelabel.custom_domain_hint: Point a CNAME record from this domain to app.usepagepersona.com
whitelabel.custom_domain_cname: Add a CNAME record pointing to:
whitelabel.custom_domain_failed: Verification failed — DNS record not found
whitelabel.urls_domain_desc: Set your agency's signup link and connect a custom domain so clients see your brand.
whitelabel.preview_subtitle: How your branding appears to clients.
whitelabel.dns_note: Add a CNAME record in your domain registrar pointing to our servers.
whitelabel.dns_root_note: Use an ALIAS or ANAME record at your registrar. On Cloudflare, use a CNAME with Host @ — it flattens automatically.
whitelabel.dns_step1_title: Step 1 — Log in to your domain registrar
whitelabel.dns_step1_body: This is the website where you bought your domain name — e.g. GoDaddy, Namecheap, Cloudflare, or wherever you registered it. Look for a section called "DNS", "DNS Management", or "Name Servers".
whitelabel.dns_step2_body: Inside the DNS settings, add a new record with the exact values in the table below. Think of it as telling the internet: "whenever someone visits my subdomain, send them to PagePersona".
whitelabel.dns_step2_example: Example: if your domain is acmeagency.com and you set the Host to clients, your branded signup link becomes clients.acmeagency.com.
whitelabel.dns_step3_body: DNS changes can take anywhere from a few minutes to 24 hours to spread across the internet. Once done, type your full domain in the field below and click Verify & Save.
whitelabel.hide_powered_by_hint: When enabled, your branded client pages will not show any PagePersona branding.

onboarding.step1_title: Welcome — let's set up your brand
onboarding.step1_subtitle: Tell us your website and we'll auto-fill your brand profile. AI will use this to write copy that actually sounds like you.
onboarding.extract_error: Couldn't read that URL. You can fill in the fields manually on the next step.
onboarding.skip_manual: Skip — I'll fill it in manually →
onboarding.step2_subtitle: AI extracted this from your website. Adjust anything, then save.
onboarding.step2_subtitle_empty: Fill in what you know — you can always update this later in Settings.
onboarding.tone_placeholder: e.g. Professional but friendly, witty, authoritative...
onboarding.audience_placeholder: e.g. B2B founders aged 30–50 who want to save time
onboarding.benefits_placeholder: e.g. Saves 5hrs/week, no code required, boosts conversions by 30%
onboarding.about_placeholder: Your story, what makes you different, phrases you love, things to avoid, your ideal customer's mindset... The more detail, the better every AI output will be.

dashboard.heading: Your Projects
dashboard.subheading: Manage and optimise your landing pages performance.

empty_state.heading: Welcome to PagePersona!
empty_state.description: You haven't created any projects yet. Start by adding your first page to begin personalizing your visitor experience.

step1.url_hint: Enter the full URL of the page you want to personalise

step2.heading: How is your site built?
step2.subheading: Select your platform to see the optimised installation instructions.
step2.install_note_html: Copy and paste the tracking script into the head section of your page.
step2.install_note_wordpress: Copy and paste the tracking script into your WordPress header settings or use our official plugin.

step3.heading: Install PagePersona
step3.subheading_html: Paste this script tag into the head section of your page.
step3.subheading_wordpress: Connect your WordPress site to enable PagePersona.
step3.paste_instruction: Paste this into the <head> of your page
step3.connect_wordpress_note: This will securely link PagePersona to your WordPress site. You will be redirected to your WordPress admin panel.
step3.tip: If you use a CMS like WordPress or Webflow, paste this code into the Global Header settings. Contact support if you need help with your specific platform.

project.no_activity_desc: Activity will appear here once your rules are live and visitors start arriving.

actions.setup_rules_desc: Create personalisation rules for your visitors
actions.view_analytics_desc: See how your page is performing
actions.preview_page_desc: Open your live page in a new tab
actions.content_blocks_desc: View and manage your page element map for AI

content_blocks.heading: Content Blocks
content_blocks.subheading: Your page element library — used by AI and templates to generate personalisation rules.
content_blocks.empty_pick_desc: Use the element picker to register page elements. AI and templates will use these blocks to build personalisation rules.

ai_tips.heading: AI Optimisation Tips
ai_tips.tip1: Returning visitors drop off at the pricing section. Add a personalised trust block for visitors on their 2nd+ visit.
ai_tips.tip2: Mobile visitors are 3x more likely to exit early. Consider a mobile-specific CTA above the fold.
ai_tips.tip3: Email traffic converts 2.4x better. Create a dedicated landing experience for your email subscribers.

visitors.heading: Recent Visitors
visitors.no_visitors_desc: Visitors will appear here once your script is live and tracking.

project.cta_rules_heading: Set up your first conversion rule
project.cta_rules_desc: Define who sees what — personalise your page for different visitor segments.
project.installation_paste_hint: Paste this tag before the </body> tag on your page:
project.installation_tip: The script loads asynchronously so it won't slow down your page. It only activates when a visitor matches one of your rules.
project.installation_error_not_found: Script tag not found on your page. Make sure you pasted it before the </body> tag and the page is publicly accessible.
project.installation_error_unreachable: Could not reach your page. Make sure the URL is publicly accessible.
project.delete_project_desc: will permanently remove the project and all its rules. The script tag will stop working immediately.
project.delete_project_failed: Failed to delete project. Please try again.
project.edit_project_subtitle: Update your project name and page URL.
project.project_url_hint: Changing the URL will require re-verification of the script.
project.edit_failed: Failed to update project. Please try again.
project.url_changed_warning: You changed the page URL. Please re-verify the script after saving.
project.url_editable_hint: You can edit the URL until the script is verified.
project.verify_first: Verify your script installation before creating rules
project.verify_first_picker: Verify your script installation to use the live picker
project.thumbnail_hint: Click to upload a photo that represents this project
project.installation_send_error: Failed to send email. Please try again.
project.installation_send_hint: Don't have access to the code? Send the script tag directly to your developer.

rules.heading: Personalisation Rules
rules.subheading: Define who sees what on your page based on visitor signals.
rules.empty_desc: Get started by creating your first personalisation rule. Define a trigger signal and an action to personalise your visitors experience.
rules.create_heading: How would you like to create this rule?
rules.create_subheading: Choose an approach — you can always edit the rule after it is created.
rules.mode_manual_desc: Build a rule from scratch. Full control over every condition and action.
rules.mode_template_desc: Pick a conversion goal and get 2–4 preset rules that work together.
rules.mode_ai_desc: AI analyses your page and suggests rules based on your content.
rules.template_subheading: Pick a goal — we will show you the rules that achieve it.
rules.template_preview_subheading: These rules will be created as drafts. Review and edit them before activating.
rules.builder_subheading: Define your trigger signal and what action to take when it fires.
rules.no_actions_yet: No actions added yet. Click Add Action to define what happens when this rule fires.
rules.target_hint: Type a CSS selector or click "Pick from page" to select visually
rules.target_hint_edit: Enter the block ID manually or use Pick from page to select it visually
rules.popup_none_desc: Create a popup in Elements first
rules.countdown_none_desc: Create a countdown in Elements first

picker.hover_hint: Hover over any element on the page, then click to start personalising it.
picker.default_content_desc: This is what every visitor sees by default.
picker.no_rules_desc: Everyone sees the same content on this element. Add a rule to personalise it.
picker.changes_saved_note: Changes are saved automatically to your draft.
picker.rule_name_placeholder_new: e.g. Show offer to returning visitors
picker.content_placeholder: Enter the content to show this visitor segment...
picker.failed_save: Failed to save. Please try again.
picker.failed_update: Failed to update. Please try again.

signal_modal.title: Choose a Trigger Signal
signal_modal.search_placeholder: Search signals (e.g. UTM source, device, country)...
signal_modal.signal_visit_count_desc: Number of times this visitor has visited the page
signal_modal.signal_time_on_page_desc: Seconds the visitor has spent on the page
signal_modal.signal_scroll_depth_desc: Percentage of the page the visitor has scrolled
signal_modal.signal_exit_intent_desc: Triggers when the cursor moves toward leaving the page
signal_modal.signal_visitor_type_desc: Whether this is the visitor first time or a return visit
signal_modal.signal_utm_source_desc: The source parameter from the URL e.g. email, google, facebook
signal_modal.signal_utm_medium_desc: The medium parameter e.g. cpc, email, organic
signal_modal.signal_utm_campaign_desc: The campaign name parameter from the URL
signal_modal.signal_referrer_url_desc: The website the visitor came from
signal_modal.signal_device_type_desc: The device the visitor is using
signal_modal.signal_operating_system_desc: The OS the visitor is running
signal_modal.signal_browser_desc: The browser the visitor is using
signal_modal.signal_geo_country_desc: The country the visitor is located in
signal_modal.signal_geo_city_desc: The city the visitor is located in
signal_modal.signal_day_time_desc: The day or time when the visitor arrives
signal_modal.signal_company_name_desc: Identify visitors by their company domain via IP registry
signal_modal.signal_industry_desc: The industry vertical of the visitor company
signal_modal.signal_company_size_desc: Number of employees at the visitor company

elements.title: Elements

popup_builder.headline: Headline
popup_builder.body_placeholder: e.g. Grab our exclusive offer before you go.
popup_builder.live_preview_hint: Live Preview · Click any element to edit
popup_builder.template_subheading: Pick one to customise, or start blank
popup_builder.block_columns_hint: Click elements inside the columns to edit them.
popup_builder.dont_show_desc: When enabled, clicking this hides the popup permanently for this visitor.
popup_builder.embed_hint: Paste Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or any HTML here.
popup_builder.add_elements_hint: Add elements from the left panel
popup_builder.countdown_block_none: No countdowns yet — create one in Elements

countdown_builder.ends_at_hint: Date and time in your local timezone

countdown_builder.template_subheading: Pick a style to customise, or start blank
countdown_builder.date_required: Please set an end date and time
countdown_builder.duration_hint: Counts down from each visitor's first view
